zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda de Strathearn於1184年出生在蘇格蘭時，她的父親Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn34歲，母親Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn42歲。她和David Macduff至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1247年在英國瓦維其可爾享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda de Strathearn于1184年出生在苏格兰时，她的父亲Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn34岁，母亲Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn42岁。她和David Macduff至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1247年在英国瓦維其可爾享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Strathearn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Strathearn in Perthshire. The placename means ‘the valley of the river Earn’, from Gaelic srath ‘valley’ + the river name Earn.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda de Strathearn was born in 1184, in Scotland, her father, Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn, was 34 and her mother, Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn, was 42. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with David Macduff. She died in 1247, in Warwickshire, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda de Strathearn est née en 1184, à Écosse, son père, Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn, avait 42 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec David Macduff. Elle est décédée en 1247, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda de Strathearn 1184 in Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn 34 und ihre Mutter Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn 42. Sie hatte mit David Macduff mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1247 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda de Strathearn è nata il nel 1184 nel Scotland, sua padre, Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn, aveva 42 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con David Macduff. Morì nel 1247, nel Warwickshire, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda de Strathearnが1184年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearnは34歳，母Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearnは42歳であった。彼女はDavid Macduffとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1247年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda de Strathearn(이)가 1184년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 David Macduff(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1247년 영국 워윅실르에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda de Strathearn nasceu em 1184, em Scotland, seu pai, Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn, tinha 42 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com David Macduff. Ela faleceu em 1247, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda de Strathearn родилась в 1184 г. в местности Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn, 42. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от David Macduff. Она умерла в 1247 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda de Strathearn nació en 1184, en Scotland, su papá, Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con David Macduff. Murió en 1247, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
